failure_pattern: Refund explanations omit POL-REFUND policy citations
root_cause: The current prompt requires policy citations 'whenever you reference a policy' but does not explicitly bind that requirement to refund-category responses. The agent treats general refund explanations (without a specific policy lookup) as exempt and skips the citation, producing answers like 'refunds are processed in 5-10 business days' with no POL-XXX reference.
evidence_summary: Two runs (seed-run-fail-001, seed-run-fail-002) on refund-category tickets returned answers with citations=[] and were marked fail by citation_presence. Both runs called get_customer_context but skipped search_policy — the prompt does not require a policy lookup on refund tickets that do not promise a specific refund.
evidence: seed-run-fail-001: refund explanation with no POL-XXX citation
seed-run-fail-002: refund timing answer with no POL-XXX citation
suggested_fix: Append to the Response Quality Rules: 'For any refund-category response, you MUST call search_policy and cite at least one POL-REFUND-XXX policy ID — even when explaining timing, eligibility windows, or general refund rules. A vague "refund policy" reference is not a citation.'
